purpose: Product and dependency update backlog for Unica bundled tools, plugin package dependencies, and release-package inputs.

products.notes: Updated tools.lock.json to v0.2.37; analyze/search/MCP help gates passed, graph and diagnostics capabilities are exposed only through typed unica.code.* tools.
v1.21.0 was applied together with rlm-bsl-index; v1.22.0 drift was detected after that batch and is intentionally kept out of the bsl-analyzer update.
v1.21.0 index build/update/info and BUILDER_VERSION 14 were applied; v1.22.0 drift needs a separate schema and rebuild review.
Updated tools.lock.json to v0.5.1 after reviewing the version command and partial-load/build changes; Unica MCP contract remains typed and unchanged.
Update web-test package-lock and verify Playwright import/version.
Pin tests/ci/requirements.txt to make CI dependency state reproducible.
cargo update --dry-run reports compatible transitive updates only; direct major updates stay out of this batch.
